MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: This is a survey about your use of drugs and alcohol. Select the response that applies to you.
MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: Self-report of tobacco, alcohol, marijuana and other substance use. Item-level data only (no summary score). Many items are branched (shown only after a relevant gate item) so values are frequently n/a by design. Two items (substance_othr_040 'Bleomycins', substance_othr_050 'Cadrines') are fictitious-drug validity checks; see invalid_fake_drugs.

drugs_club___0.Description: None of the above (checkbox option; 1 = selected, 0 = not selected)

drugs_club___4.Description: Ketamine (Special K) (checkbox option; 1 = selected, 0 = not selected)

drugs_depressants___0.Description: None of the above (checkbox option; 1 = selected, 0 = not selected)

drugs_stimulants___0.Description: None of the above (checkbox option; 1 = selected, 0 = not selected)

Levels.1: I have never tried alcohol, but might sometime
Levels.2: I have tried alcohol, but have not used it in the past 12 months
Levels.3: I have tried alcohol, but have only used it once in a while in the past 12 months
Levels.4: I have tried alcohol, and have used it a lot in the past 12 months

substance_alc_020.Description: Have you ever drank alcohol without your parents saying you could?

substance_alc_030.Description: How old were you when you first tried more alcohol than the small amount allowed by your parents?

substance_alc_050.Description: During the past 12 months, about how many times did you drink alcohol?

Levels.1: Every day or nearly every day

substance_alc_060.Description: How old were you when you first drank alcohol every day or nearly every day?

Levels.2: 12 years old

substance_alc_100.Description: In the past 12 months, when you drank alcohol, how many drinks did you usually have?A drink is a glass of wine, a bottle or can of beer, a shot glass of liquor, or a mixed drink.

substance_alc_110.Description: In the past 12 months, what is the largest number of drinks you had at one time?A drink is a glass of wine, a bottle or can of beer, a shot glass of liquor, or a mixed drink.

substance_alc_120.Description: Have you ever gotten drunk or high from alcohol?

substance_alc_130.Description: How old were you when you first got drunk or high from alcohol?

substance_alc_140.Description: Have you been drunk or high from alcohol in the past 12 months?

substance_alc_150.Description: In the past 12 months, when you drank how often did you drink enough to become high or drunk?

Levels.1: Nearly every time or every time
Levels.2: About half the time
Levels.3: Less than half of the time

substance_alc_160.Description: How many times in the past 12 months have you been drunk?

Levels.1: Every day or nearly every day

substance_alcexp_yn01.Description: Earlier, you said you have used ALCOHOL. We would like toknow what has happened to you when you have used alcohol. You will beshown some things that might happen when people use alcohol. For each one,decide whether it has ever happened to you. Was this something that hashappened to me when I used alcohol? I felt very mellow, calm, and happy.

substance_alcexp_yn02.Description: I had a lot of fun with friends at a party.

substance_alcexp_yn05.Description: I passed out and couldn't remember what I did.

substance_alcexp_yn12.Description: I got into trouble with my parents.

substance_mar_010.Description: Have you ever used marijuana (grass) or hashish?

Levels.0: I have never tried marijuana or hashish.
Levels.1: I have never tried marijuana or hashish, but might sometime.
Levels.2: I have tried marijuana or hashish, but have not used it in the past 12 months.
Levels.3: I have tried marijuana or hashish, but have used it only once in a while in the past 12 months.
Levels.4: I have tried marijuana or hashish, and have used it a lot in the past 12 months.

substance_mar_020.Description: How old were you when you first tried marijuana (grass) or hashish?

substance_mar_040.Description: During the past 12 months, about how often did you use marijuana or hashish?

Levels.1: Every day or nearly every day

substance_mar_050.Description: How old were you when you first smoked marijuana or hashish every day or nearly every day?

substance_practice_age.Description: There are two types of questions on this test. The first question, "How old are you?" is an example of the first type of question. In this type of question, you answer by selecting one of the responses. Go ahead now and answer the question by selecting your age. When you've selected your response, click on the "Next Page >>" button. How old are you?

substance_tob_010.Description: Have you ever used tobacco (for example cigarettes, cigars, chewing tobacco)?

Levels.1: I have never tried tobacco, but might sometime.
Levels.2: I have tried tobacco, but have not used it in the past 12 months.
Levels.3: I have tried tobacco, but have used it only once in a while in the past 12 months.
Levels.4: I have tried tobacco, and have used it a lot in the past 12 months.

substance_tob_020___2.Description: Smoked a pipe or cigar (checkbox option; 1 = selected, 0 = not selected)

Levels.3: About half a tin per day
Levels.4: Less than half a tin per day
Levels.6: Less than one pinch per day

invalid_fake_drugs.Description: Validity flag: 1 if the participant endorsed (non-zero response) either of two fictitious drugs - substance_othr_040 ('Bleomycins') or substance_othr_050 ('Cadrines'). Because these drugs do not exist, endorsement indicates careless/invalid responding. Blank/n/a otherwise.
